labels.name: defaultErrorMessage
labels.value: An unexpected error occurred. Try again later.

labels.name: getCartItemsEffectiveAccountNotFoundErrorMessage
labels.value: You don't have permission to get the items on this cart.

labels.name: getCartItemsInsufficientAccessErrorMessage
labels.value: You need permission to access the cart. The store admin can help with that.

labels.name: getCartItemsInvalidInputErrorMessage
labels.value: We can't get items in this cart. Try again later.

labels.name: webstoreNotFoundErrorMessage
labels.value: You don't have access to this store.
